signInSubtitle: Sign in to your account and let's go on an adventure!
signInError: Hmm, that does not look right. Try again! 🤔
createSubtitle: Create your account and start your adventure!
validationEmailInvalid: Hmm, that email does not look quite right 🤔
validationPasswordTooShort: Make it longer — at least 12 characters! 💪
validationPasswordsMismatch: Oops! Those passwords do not match 🔄
validationTermsRequired: Please agree to the rules first! 📋
emailTaken: That email is already taken! Try another one 🤷
somethingWentWrong: Oops! Something went wrong. Try again! 😅
forgotSubtitle: No worries! Enter your email and we'll help you get back in.
resetSentTo: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Follow the instructions to get back in!
resetNoAccount: No account found with that email 🤷
resetInvalidEmail: Hmm, that does not look like a valid email 🤔
resetTooManyRequests: Whoa, too many tries! Take a break and try again later ⏳
